title: Hanging room for a temporary shelter
abstract: A hanging room is presented. The hanging room includes three or more sides. The hanging room also includes multiple fastening straps. Each first fastening strap is attached to one side of the three or more sides. The hanging room further includes multiple fasteners, each fastener is attached to one fastening strap. Each fastener attaches the hanging room to a shelter.
claims: Claims CLAIMS WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A hanging room, comprising: at least three sides; a plurality of first fastening straps, each first fastening strap attached to one side of the at least three sides; and a plurality of first fasteners, each first fastener attached to one first fastening strap, and each first fastener attaches the hanging room to a shelter. 2. The hanging room of claim 1, in which at least one side is detachably connected to an adjacent side. 3. The hanging room of claim 2, further comprising a connecting apparatus to detachably connect the at least one side to the adjacent side. 4. The hanging room of claim 3, in which the connecting apparatus is at least one of a zipper, Velcro, hooks and loops, buttons, or a combination thereof. 5. The hanging room of claim 1, in which each first fastening strap is attached to an upper portion of each side. 6. The hanging room of claim 5, in which the each first fastener attaches to one of an inner truss link, an outer truss link, a joint, a center bracket, a leg bracket, or a leg. 7. The hanging room of claim 1, further comprising a plurality of second fastening straps actuated to a lower portion of each side. 8. The hanging room of claim 7, further comprising a plurality of second fasteners, each second fastener attached to one of the second fastening straps. 9. The hanging room of claim 8, in which each second fastener is attached to a floor.
